3196880.name: Project:Null Hypothesis Demo
3196880.description:
Project Null Hypothesis - Demo
You will play as "The Found Notes of Elis" and explore the anomalous space with him. In the demo version, you will take your first steps in exploring the mysterious backrooms, where time and space follow their own rules. Explore the abandoned levels, listen to Elis's notes, collect clues, and try to understand what lies behind this endless labyrinth. Each room is a new hypothesis, and every mistake could be your last.

We are available on Telegram, Discord, and Youtube
3196880.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
